metadata.name: omegax_protocol
metadata.description: OmegaX health capital markets protocol with reserve domains, health plans, funding lines, and capital classes

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not authorized for this scope

errors.name: IdentifierTooLong
errors.msg: Identifier length exceeds the canonical maximum

errors.name: PolicySeriesMissing
errors.msg: Policy series is missing where one is required

errors.name: LPPositionHasActiveCapital
errors.msg: LP position with active capital cannot be decredentialed

errors.name: LockupActive
errors.msg: Capital class lockup is still active

errors.name: MembershipProofModeMismatch
errors.msg: Membership proof mode does not match the configured plan posture

errors.name: MembershipInviteAuthorityInvalid
errors.msg: Invite authority is missing or invalid for this plan

errors.name: MembershipTokenGateOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Token-gate proof account owner does not match the enrolling wallet

errors.name: MembershipTokenGateMintMismatch
errors.msg: Token-gate proof account mint does not match the configured gate mint

errors.name: MembershipTokenGateAmountTooLow
errors.msg: Token-gate proof amount is below the configured minimum

errors.name: MembershipAnchorSeatRequired
errors.msg: Anchor-backed membership requires an anchor seat account

errors.name: MembershipAnchorSeatAlreadyActive
errors.msg: Anchor-backed membership seat is already active

errors.name: MembershipAnchorSeatMismatch
errors.msg: Anchor-backed membership seat does not match the provided anchor reference

errors.name: MembershipAnchorReferenceMissing
errors.msg: Anchor-backed membership requires a non-zero anchor reference

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: Bounded string field exceeds the canonical maximum

errors.name: TooManyOracleSupportedSchemas
errors.msg: Too many supported schema hashes were provided for one oracle profile

errors.name: PoolOracleApprovalRequired
errors.msg: Pool oracle approval is required before permissions can be granted

errors.name: OracleProfileUnclaimed
errors.msg: Oracle profile has not been claimed by its signing key

errors.name: InvalidClaimAttestationDecision
errors.msg: Claim attestation decision is not a recognized value

errors.name: ClaimAttestationSchemaRequired
errors.msg: Claim attestation must reference a registered schema key hash

errors.name: ClaimAttestationSchemaUnsupported
errors.msg: Oracle profile does not advertise support for the selected claim-attestation schema

errors.name: TooManySchemaDependencies
errors.msg: Too many schema dependency addresses were provided
